programme.title: Home Alone: Behind the Shower Curtain
programme.desc: Catherine thinks that dumping her boyfriend will solve her problems, but when he breaks into her home intending to kill her, he takes her family hostage.

programme.title: Home Alone: Demons of the Past
programme.desc: In desolate, isolated Nebraska in 2014, Valerie and her loving adopted son Nathan are starting a new chapter of their lives when a knock at the door one night brings back demons of the past.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Face and a Voice
programme.desc: When a beautiful young school teacher is murdered in her home, police must rely on the eye witness testimony of a young neighbour who saw her killer lurking outside her window.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Sirens in the Night
programme.desc: The body of a young woman is found in the ashes of a fire.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: As She Lay Dying
programme.desc: A young mother is viciously stabbed in broad daylight, her final words to police may hold the key to solving her murder.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Good Morning, Goodnight and Goodbye
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears on her way to visit friends. As police retrace her last known movements, they uncover a terrifying possibility, the 16-year-old may have been kidnapped by an international human trafficking ring.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Truth Never Dies
programme.desc: When a young woman is found shot to death in her home police are baffled. Then a cryptic letter from a mysterious source sends the investigation down a twisting road to the truth.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Depths of Evil
programme.desc: As police search for a young mother missing from her home, they never could have imagined the evidence they discovered would put them on the trail of a deadly sexual predator.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Mr. Fix It
programme.desc: City-girl Leslie Belkin moves south and meets a man on Craigslist. At first George seems perfect - he's nice and helpful around the yard. But once she discovers his criminal record, she realizes she isn't the only casual encounter George has made online.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Only Way Out
programme.desc: Teenagers Robert and Grace meet online and fall in love. After several years, Robert moves 2000 miles to be closer to Grace. When her father nixes an attempt to meet in the real world, the pair hatch a plot online that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Crowded House
programme.desc: Lonely teen Jessica Sacco turns to the internet to find other so-called 'Juggalos' who share her interests in edgy music. There, she makes new friends and even finds a boyfriend. She moves in with them, and soon finds herself unable to escape their grip.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Honeytrap
programme.desc: An aspiring young boxer leaves in night to meet girl who added him on Facebook. The next day he if sound dead in his car and the murder reveals a dark family secret kept hidden for over 30 years.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Playing Doctor
programme.desc: 24-year-old Jessika Rovell falls for Jeffrey Marsalis' charm and good looks but when she discovers his secret online life as Dr. Jeff, she realizes she's been dating a monster who stalks dating websites.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Las Vegas
programme.desc: Unravel the seamy secrets of Las Vegas. Where Mobsters once ruled. Where casinos suck you in to keep you playing and losing. See why this was a Nazi target for wartime sabotage, a test ground for atomic bombs and a meeting place for 9/11's terrorists.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Untold Story of the Rescue at Dogshead
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Tet Offensive
programme.desc: During the infamous Tet Offensive of 1968, an elite band of US Special Operations troops are called in to rescue dozens of helpless civilians trapped in the border town of Chau Doc, which has been captured by an overwhelming Viet Cong invasion force.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Search and Destroy
programme.desc: In a battle known as the Nine Days in May, the troops of the US 4th Infantry Division are on a search and destroy mission in Vietnam's Central Highlands when they run headlong into a massive force of North Vietnamese soldiers on the Cambodian border.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Fallujah
programme.desc: Fallujah, Iraq's most volatile city, has become a haven for radical Muslim fighters from around the world. To root them out, the U.S. military unleashes Operation Phantom Fury. Soldiers and Marines engage the enemy in brutal urban combat.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Unfinished Business

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Cottage
programme.desc: The guys turn a brand new storage shed into an 1800s log cabin, then drive it to Round Top, Texas. Mark gets a lesson from a local silversmith, and the team visits historic structures built around the state by 19th-century pioneers.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Biggest Barn Ever
programme.desc: In Texas, the Barnwood Builders raise the largest timberframe they have ever built by combining wood and steel. Along the way, they battle hundred degree temperatures, and Mark explores a renovated inn with the Junk Gypsies.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Tennessee Treasure
programme.desc: The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tennessee. Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and then tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Teach and Train
programme.desc: One half of the team restores a huge log cabin at the Boneyard, the other half teaches some young men how to build a cabin in Tennessee. Meanwhile, Mark scouts a cabin built with pine logs, and the guys visit a shop filled with old-time treasures.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Neglected Craftsman Gets New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Chris and Aimee just bought a home that desperately needs help and Ally Mahon is up for the challenge. Ally is determined to take their fixer-upper and turn it into a beautiful new home for their growing family.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Victorian Upgrade
programme.desc: Ally helps a pair of homeowners upgrade their old Victorian home with a new front porch and a complete kitchen makeover. With a limited budget, Ally definitely has her work cut out for her, and the winter weather isn't doing her any favors either.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Scandinavian Style Makeover
programme.desc: Ally gets a call to update and expand a vintage farmhouse for a family of six, including a more functional master bathroom with a sauna, and a more spacious and modern kitchen. With her skills for repurposing, she might just be able to pull it off.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: 1920s Fixer-Upper Gets a Chic Kitchen and Bedroom Renovation
programme.desc: After purchasing a fixer-upper that turned out to be more than she could handle, a new homeowner calls on Ally to help update her kitchen and bedroom to match her style.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Mid-century Masculine
programme.desc: A single father returns home from being deployed overseas hoping Ally can help him turn his ranch-style house into a family home for him and his two boys. Ally also reinvents the boys' bedrooms using reclaimed materials.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Craftsman Inside and Out
programme.desc: Newlyweds ask Ally to build them a Craftsman kitchen that matches the rest of their house. While she's at it, they've also asked her to turn their mud pit of a backyard into one that's fit for entertaining.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: French Country Revival
programme.desc: A couple calls on Ally to help them celebrate their 25th wedding anniversary by renovating their beloved home. When she starts ripping out the 1920's farmhouse's walls she finds several surprises that slow her progress.

programme.title: Vintage Rehab: Colonial Meets Art Deco
programme.desc: After buying the vintage home of their dreams, a couple's plans of renovating fell by the wayside and they need help getting back on track. Ally's plans incorporate restored antique pieces while playing on the existing art deco accents.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mountain Timber Frame
programme.desc: A man builds an off-grid timber frame cabin on his family's 100-acre property in upstate New York.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ohio Valley Hut
programme.desc: Two brothers build a high-end, off-grid vacation home on their Ohio family's cattle ranch.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cascade Mountain Escape
programme.desc: A couple builds their 2400-square-foot dream cabin in the Cascade Mountains of Washington State.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Piney Woods Place
programme.desc: Cat Taylor constructs a remote sanctuary for her and her husband in the woods of Northwest Texas. The two-story home is made from sand, clay and straw.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Royals and the Red River City
programme.desc: Noah begins his journey at the Royal Winter Fair in Toronto, Canada, where he says "yes, cheese" to the blue balsamic. Later, he ends his culinary adventure at the State Fair of Louisiana with the sweet Not Yo' Average Nachos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Lights and Literature
programme.desc: Noah tries his hand at making a deep fried root beer float and torches a berry brulee waffle.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Burgers and Bombs
programme.desc: Start the season off right with whacky takes on some fairground classics, with The Waffle Burger and the Donut Philly Cheesesteak. 'Zanado Fries and a S'mores Cobbler round off the day.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Cowboys and Cakes
programme.desc: Noah joins the crowd of the Fort Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas to experience the meaty Cowboy Burrito and the Texas Juicy Lucy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Freak Show of Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is sampling the craziest and most delicious funnel cakes from across the country.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Noah dives into some of the cheesiest dishes featured on Carnival Eats.

programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Super Simple Suppers
programme.desc: After a long day, preparing a meal from scratch can often seem like a daunting task. Before you reach for the takeout menu, Laura will show you a simple and delicious crowd pleasing supper that's ready in a flash.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Papa's Pizza
programme.desc: Laura makes some of her dad's favorites before he joins her in the kitchen for a pizza throw down. First up Sal's grilled seafood salad with calamari and shrimp, next it's a classic margherita pizza.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Laura's Leftovers
programme.desc: There is nothing more fun and creative than making a new meal from yesterday's leftovers. Laura demonstrates her tricks for turning everyday leftovers into a delicious meal.

programme.title: Simply Laura: 15-Minute Meals
programme.desc: Laura has a busy day and only has 15 minutes for each of her meals.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Family Game Night
programme.desc: Laura Vitale hosts a casual game night. Everyone has a job to do, including Papa Sal, who joins Laura to prepare his spicy steamed mussels. Her guests make their selections from the classic Italian antipasti and enjoy short rib and béchamel lasagna.

programme.title: Simply Laura: Italian Girl in the Garden State
programme.desc: Growing up in Italy, vegetables were the star of Laura Vitale's plates and now, she has recipes to turn local New Jersey veggies into standing ovation dishes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Chocolate Lovers Delight
programme.desc: Bobby puts together a decadent brunch based entirely around chocolate.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Caribbean Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby cooks up a Caribbean lunch with mango-papaya brown butter cinnamon crepes.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Brunch for a Bunch
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is always prepared with this crowd-pleasing brunch menu.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Southern, Spicy and Sweet
programme.desc: Bobby Flay makes a surprise guest appearance as Michael visits an over-the-top barbecue joint in New York with a one-of-a-kind brontosaurus beef rib. In Nashville, local tradition is hot chicken, Michael pushes his personal limit.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Good Eats: In the Bulb of the Night (Garlic)
programme.desc: Meet the Count and discover the miraculous properties of the humble garlic bulb.

programme.title: Good Eats: Squid Pro Quo
programme.desc: Alton prepares a menu featuring his favourite tailgate-able sea monster - squid.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Indiana State Fair/ Old Canal Days
programme.desc: At the Indiana State Fair, Noah Cappe devours a colossal grilled cheese sandwich and a fried elephant ear filled with fruit and Greek tomato balls. At Old Canal Days in Illinois, he samples loaded potato bites, Chicago-style pizza pie and a donut treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Illinois State Fair/ Erie County Fair
programme.desc: Noah gets lucky in Illinois with the horseshoe sandwich, and gets Buffalo chicken pizza in New York.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: K-Days/ North Dakota State Fair
programme.desc: Noah begs for s'mores mini donuts in Edmonton and heads to North Dakota for wild rice burgers.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Canadian National Exhibition/ Prairiefest
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is at the Canadian National Exhibition in Toronto to try a Thanksgiving waffle. Then he's off the Prairiefest in Oswego where he indulges in a kimchee Korean hot dog.

programme.desc: Doc and the toys learn how to wash their hands.

programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: It's About Time!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb find an unfinished time machine in a museum and decide to fix it.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Oh, There You Are, Perry/ Swiss Family Phineas
programme.desc: A musical device is built to find Perry/ A trip at sea strands the family on an island.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Rollercoaster: The Musical!
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb build a rollercoaster in their backyard, Candace tries to bust them by getting their mom to return from the grocery store early, and Dr. Doofenshmirtz attempts to pull the Eastern Seaboard to the west using tinfoil and a giant magnet.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Lizard Whisperer/ Robot Rodeo
programme.desc: After being inadvertently zapped by a 'gigantinator' ray, Phineas and Ferb's chameleon grows to the size of a dinosaur. Candace and Stacy are upset because Stacy's mom does not think they are responsible enough to go to a concert on their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Agent Doof/ Phineas and Ferb the Temple of Juatchadoon
programme.desc: The boys go to Central America to help Damsel in Distress, after finding an amulet, but Dr. Doofenshmirtz wants to use their amulet to destroy the world.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Sidetracked
programme.desc: Agent P teams up with a former partner, a human agent named Lyla, to stop a runaway train running along the United States and Canadian border. Agent P and Lyla must complete the mission, defeat Doofenshmirtz and save the train's passengers.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Great Balls of Water/ Where's Pinky?
programme.desc: When Candace thinks Jeremy is bored with their usual hangouts, she sets out to find something unique to do with him. When Pinky goes missing, Phineas and Ferb create a machine that amplifies Buford's sense to those of a dog's.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: The Return of the Rogue Rabbit/ Live and Let Drive
programme.desc: Doofenshmirtz breaks a rogue animal agent out of high security prison and Perry must go to the glamorous Duchy of Montevillebad to stop Doof from winning the Grand Prix.

programme.title: Movie: Phineas and Ferb: Across the 2nd Dimension
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb team up with Agent P to travel to a parallel universe where they meet alternate versions of themselves.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: I, Brobot
programme.desc: Two stepbrothers build various objects with materials found around their home.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Push, Pull, Pogo
programme.desc: Jack tries to deliver mail on a pogo stick, Markiplier takes on a boss battle in Cuphead, Dan swallows up scenery in Donut County, and Muselk attempts a new Fortnite challenge.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Give Me All Your Cheese
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: World of X Games: Real Ski 2020
programme.desc: The all-video competition highlights the world's best urban freeski athletes battling for X Games Real Ski gold in 2020. Athletes include: Jake Mageau, Alex Hackel, Emile Bergeron, Jesper Tjader, Noah Albaladejo and Sam Zahner.

programme.title: E:60 Pictures: Drew Bledsoe: Better With Age
programme.desc: An unfiltered interview with former number one draft pick Drew Bledsoe, on living in the shadow of the Tom Brady dynasty, the tackle that nearly cost him his life and how he's found peace as a successful winemaker.

programme.desc: Meredith struggles with Derek's discovery of her mother's old diary. Elsewhere, Callie frets as she prepares for her first official date with Erica and Cristina stumbles into a part of the hospital that neither she nor her fellow residents have ever seen.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: There's No 'I' in Team
programme.desc: Bailey spearheads a domino surgery in which each procedure depends on the success of the one before it. Meanwhile, Derek gets sole credit for the brain tumour study he did with Meredith, while Lexie goes to great lengths to get George to notice her.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Life During Wartime
programme.desc: To help Bailey become the best general surgeon at Seattle Grace, the Chief gives her new responsibility along with the challenge of removing a young girl's inoperable tumour,.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Rise Up
programme.desc: The Chief announces that a solo surgery will be awarded sending the residents into a competitive frenzy; Derek turns to Bailey for advice and Erica discovers a shocking connection between one of her surgical residents and a long-time patient.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Ties That Bind
programme.desc: One of Meredith's oldest friends becomes an intern at Seattle Grace but Meredith's friends are less than welcoming. Lexie leads her fellow interns in secretive, unorthodox surgical training sessions and a new surgeon brings order to the OR.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Wish You Were Here

programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: JJ and the MSO crew are still celebrating their win against NOLA when they're called out by Quinn and his team from Kentucky. Quinn has a big mouth and the big guns to back it up, now it's up to Memphis to respond.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Full Throttle: Kentucky Fried Finish
programme.desc: With added facts and bonus content: The race against Kentucky continues with face-to-face confrontations, boiling tempers and a more-than-determined MSO ready to prove their skills.

programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.desc: Beau Boeckmann and the Galpin Crew resurrect a one-of-a-kind Pantera that Carroll Shelby hot-rodded for a secret project with Lee Iacocca. Meanwhile, a celebrity client arrives to pick up his restored '68 Charger with modern muscle under the hood.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Super Troupe Jeep
programme.desc: Gas Monkey teams up with the Gary Sinese Foundation to build a custom '81 Jeep CJ7 as a throwback tribute to the soldiers for Veteran's Day. Later, an original '68 Chevelle has Richard seeing green but only if he can part with his California dream.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Ford Galaxie, Part II/ Nash Healey
programme.desc: With Aaron temporarily missing, the crew works on the Ford Galaxie. The shop gets crank calls from a guy claiming to be Dale Earnhardt Jr.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Meet Virginia
programme.desc: Race night gets rowdy when Memphis welcomes a new racing group from Virginia. The newcomers talk a big game but run out of cars after only a few races, leaving Molly and Ole Heavy without a race until Virginia can fix their cars and return.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Proof is in the Payoff
programme.desc: Tim and Tickle return to the scene of past crimes and rediscover their passion for outlaw moonshining. Mark Rogers designs a custom pot still to double distill shine he can sell for twice the price. Mark and Digger hand-build a copper mailbox still.

programme.title: Moonshiners: What Happens in the Woods
programme.desc: After returning to the backwoods, Tickle mashes in his first batch of illegal shine in six seasons. Mark and Digger scramble to save their Popcorn Sutton legacy mash before it spoils. With Daniel on the mend, Mike quietly takes on a new full-time partner.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Into the Canyons
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face down the high desert canyons of Matt's home of 20 years: southern Utah. Without knives or any modern supplies, they attempt to survive and seek rescue in this harsh terrain that's more favorable to rattlesnakes and mountain lions.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Grin and Bear It
programme.desc: Joe and Matt trek through the Alleghany Mountains of Pennsylvania, where Joe grew-up and first learned survival skills. Traveling in freezing rain, blocked by steep ravines, and deep in bear country, they're racing against Mother Nature to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Swamplandia
programme.desc: Stranded in a black water swamp in southern Georgia, Joe and Matt are deep in alligator territory where peat bogs, mysterious floating islands, and poisonous snakes stand in the way of getting out and finding rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Waterlogged
programme.desc: Off the beaten path and waterlogged in the rainforest of Costa Rica, Matt and Joe battle torrential rains, deadly insects, and raging rapids. After missing a shot at rescue, they combine survival ingenuity with indigenous skills to get out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Coastal Catastrophe
programme.desc: Marooned on a rocky coast in the Pacific Northwest, Matt and Joe struggle to get away from powerful waves and come head to head over the question of whether to hunker down or travel deeper into one of the darkest, wettest forest in the United States.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part One
programme.desc: In the snowiest part of Wyoming, Matt and Joe demonstrate how to repurpose a broken down snowmobile, make shelter from snow, and survive sub-freezing temperatures in whiteout conditions that cause them to miss a chance at rescue.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Winter Vortex: Part Two
programme.desc: Stranded in Wyoming's snowy mountains, Matt and Joe are threatened by hypothermia and predatory mountain lions. In frigid conditions, the pair takes their biggest risk yet by splitting up.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Himalayan Hardship
programme.desc: In the Himalayas, Joe seeks rescue from the rocky terrain, dense forest, and animal threats while Matt seems more interested in achieving spiritual enlightenment than getting out alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Namibian Nightmare
programme.desc: Stranded in the vast scrubland of Namibia, Joe and Matt are in a race to get out alive from one of the driest countries on earth. They run into trouble with a troop of baboons, proving that Mother Nature isn't the only force in the wilderness.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mike and Caroline
programme.desc: Mike fell in love with Caroline online. He grew suspicious when she continually avoided meeting him, yet left notes at his car. Mike then learns that she is diagnosed with cancer.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Nina and Jon
programme.desc: Webcam model Nina is considering leaving her husband for a big-spender client she's fallen in love with online. Nev and Max investigate this high-stakes case to determine if his big tips come with bigger lies.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Joe and Kari Ann
programme.desc: After four months, Joe thinks he might be in touch with the real Kari Ann.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Harold and Armani
programme.desc: Harold found his match with a beautiful jock named Armani. Although the two live in the same neighbourhood, they've never met. Nev is joined by recording artist Angel Haze to help Harold finally get together with his girl.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Mandy and Jose
programme.desc: Mandy is in love with a guy that showers her with everything but honesty. Mandy's son recruits Nev and Max to help him get the truth for his mom. A trail of clues sends them all deeper down the rabbit hole.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Aubri and Brian
programme.desc: Nev and Slick Woods help 19-year-old Aubri find her Snapchat love, Brian, who says he lives at Aubri's college but has shady excuses not to meet. Nev and Slick hit campus in search of answers.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Hundra and Emily
programme.desc: Hundra never planned on falling in love with a girl and now she is risking coming out on national TV to learn if her love with Emily is for real. Special guest Machine Gun Kelly teams with Nev to reveal a shocking Catfish.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Taylor and Christian
programme.desc: Taylor needs help after falling for a guy that claims to have gone to her high school but whom she doesn't remember. Nev and co-host Tallulah dig in to Taylor's tale only to uncover secrets more shocking than they ever expected.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Vince and Alyssa
programme.desc: Vince's girlfriend, Liz, breaks up with him because he cannot find an escape from his online-ex, Alyssa. Nev and Max help Vince confront Alyssa, to mend his relationship with Liz.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Sheklia and Talli
programme.desc: A concerned son reaches out when his mom's mysterious online boyfriend seems too shady for comfort. Mom is also hiding secrets of her own, and once Nev and Max find their man, things take a bizarre turn that leave them shocked.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Ramona and Paola
programme.desc: Ramon's one shining glimmer of happiness is Paola, a girl he met on Facebook and established an exclusive online relationship with.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Lawrence and Cierra
programme.desc: After a number of near-death experiences, Lawrence survived through it all with the assurance of Cierra's online love. But with Cierra blowing Lawrence off whenever they try to meet, Nev and Max must learn the truth about her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Shawny and Jack
programme.desc: Shawny recently went through a divorce with her husband and calls Nev and Max to help uncover the shadowy identity of her attempt at new love. The situation gets interesting as they discover that Shawny may have secrets of her own.

programme.desc: Two military spouses have built a handbag empire using upcycled military materials and piecework from other military spouses, but will the more than $200 price point for a bag deter a deal?

programme.title: Shark Tank

programme.title: Shark Tank: NeatCheeks, Melni Connectors, Beneath the Ink, PittMoss

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: The Real 'War Dogs'
programme.desc: When playboy Efraim Diveroli and his partner David Packouz land a nearly $300 million contract to supply forces in Afghanistan with ammunition, they knowingly use Chinese-built products in violation of US law. Their story inspired the film 'War Dogs.'

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: A Mother's Costly Revenge
programme.desc: When financial fraudster Paul Kruse propositions his assistant's teenage daughter, this angry mom gets revenge and him behind bars. This whistleblower may not survive Kruse's sinister murder-for-hire plot.

programme.title: American Greed: Scams, Scoundrels and Scandals: Ray Nagin: New Orleans Shakedown
programme.desc: Ex New Orleans Mayor Ray Nagin exploits the tragedy of Hurricane Katrina by accepting bribes and corrupting the rebuilding efforts in the Big Easy. He is accused of bilking the devastated city out of an estimated $500,000, convicted, and sent to prison.

programme.title: Dateline: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared

programme.title: Dateline: While They Were Sleeping

programme.title: Street Signs

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fat Elvis
programme.desc: A photographer who works from home is at risk of losing his business because of a blood-thirsty cat. Then, a married couple and their son have a 21-lb cat who's become a problem.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Four Blind Cats
programme.desc: Jackson must rescue Meki and Megan from their cycle of co-dependency before they're both kicked out of Megan's parent's place. Jackson tutors a bouncer on how to handle his sweet Tasmanian devil of a cat and a couple shelters special needs cats.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: A Brave New Cat World
programme.desc: Jackson enters the Santé D'or shelter with the intention of helping an over-aggressive shelter cat, Pig Pen. However, by the time he leaves, Jackson is ready to take on the challenge of converting Santé D'or into a new shelter concept.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Katrina Storms In
programme.desc: Jackson dives deep into the world of a Los Angeles feral colony where he and his team of trappers must make order out of a world of wild cat-crawling chaos. Then, Jackson visits a family too afraid to furnish their house because of their cat's spraying.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Breaking Bald
programme.desc: Jackson works with a soft-spoken musician who feels abused by her cat and ashamed that she can't figure out how to stop it; a pair of hairless Donskoy cats who are treating their guardian, Debbi's, apartment like it's a 24-hour free-for-all party zone.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Gotham Feral Cats
programme.desc: Jackson visits New York City to meet a father and son who've been taking care of a feral cat colony in their backyard and are desperately in need of help. Also, Jackson lends his expertise to Mike and Darcy, who are dealing with an antisocial cat.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty
programme.desc: Jackson comes to the defense of Good Kitty, a feline who he must help stand up to her two feline attackers. The Cat Daddy also encounters a couple fed up with the way their cats, Tiki and Marley, are eating everything in sight.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Jekyll and Hyde Cat
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple with a blind cat who's suffering from living in a chaotic environment. He then visits a Jekyl and Hyde cat, Jude, that's a darling during the day, but a nightmare at night.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Scout's Honor
programme.desc: Scout is so afraid of its tormentor, Caramel, that he literally lives inside a kitchen cabinet; A woman who adopted a hybrid Bengal cat who can use the toilet but can't keep otherwise keep still.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Mayday! Mayday!
programme.desc: Jackson experiences his most vicious, and most illuminating, cat attack of not just the season, but in years, at the claws of a troubled cat named May. Also, the Cat Daddy must help a nervous-wreck of a cat guardian move her two very feral cats to Canada.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Nightmare on Cat Street
programme.desc: Jackson works with a couple who have a lovable cat, Zachary, that also happens to spray all over the house. Jackson has a shocking conclusion as to why Zachary marks. Then, Jackson meets up with troublemaking cat named Freddie Krueger.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Where Is Everybody?
programme.desc: A man has no idea what he's been doing and how he got to where he is, but the one thing he knows is that he's in a small American town. His main problem is that the town appears to be completely deserted.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One for the Angels
programme.desc: A man refuses to go with a grim reaper, which only causes death to prey on someone else.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Denton on Doomsday
programme.desc: Once the legendary town gunslinger, Al Denton has been experiencing rough times. He's become the town drunk and is ostracized by the people. He dreams of regaining his skills with a sixgun which may come a reality when a peddler passes by for a visit.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Sixteen-Millimeter Shrine
programme.desc: An ancient Hollywood icon is convinced she's not too old to play romantic roles.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Escape Clause
programme.desc: A man makes a deal with the Devil to endow him perfect health and immortality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Lonely
programme.desc: A convicted murderer imprisoned on an asteroid is sent a unique, android companion.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Time Enough at Last
programme.desc: A busy bank teller wishes for time alone to read, but gets more than he bargained for.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Perchance to Dream
programme.desc: A man has a recurring nightmare of a gorgeous woman luring him to death's bed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Judgement Night
programme.desc: A man finds himself on a British ship in the middle of a foggy night in 1942 and for some reason knows that the ship is doomed but no one will believe him. With time running out, he knows he holds his own fate.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What You Need
programme.desc: A mysterious peddler gives customers exactly what they need to lead a better life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Four of Us Are Dying
programme.desc: A man with the ability to change his face gets in over his head.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Third From the Sun
programme.desc: Aware of an impending nuclear war, a scientist and pilot conspire to leave the planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: I Shot An Arrow Into the Air
programme.desc: Astronauts crash land and begin a fight for survival against each other.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hitch-hiker
programme.desc: A young lady heading on cross-country sees the same terrifying hitchhiker repeatedly.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Last Flight
programme.desc: No one believes a pilot's story that flying through a cloud transported him to the future.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Purple Testament
programme.desc: A lieutenant in the Second World War has the power to see which of his soldiers will die.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Elegy
programme.desc: Astronauts land on an asteroid that appears like Earth, except that no one moves.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Five Characters in Search of An Exit
programme.desc: Five people trapped in a cyclical prison realize they must escape or lose their minds.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A WWII officer is able to see both sides of the story during a battle with the Japanese.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Nothing in the Dark
programme.desc: An elderly woman is haunted by her frequent fear of death knocking on her door incognito.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: One More Pallbearer
programme.desc: A millionaire stages a mock nuclear bomb threat to get revenge on several enemies.

programme.title: Home Town: Inspired By the Sea
programme.desc: A woman who has been renting for years is ready to buy a home, and her wish list includes a master bathroom with a big bathtub. Ben and Erin capitalize on the charm of the house and design a Nantucket-inspired kitchen and a stunning master suite.

programme.title: Home Town: Home Away From Home
programme.desc: A couple wants a vacation home that's big enough to entertain but manageable to maintain. After showing them a 1920s cottage and a 1912 Craftsman, Ben and Erin create the perfect getaway for them with a large chef's kitchen.

programme.title: Home Town: Bachelor's Paradise
programme.desc: After years of travelling, a bachelor is ready to buy a home where his family has lived for five generations. Ben and Erin find a cottage with good resale potential, and their design includes a stunning master bedroom and a quaint front porch.

programme.title: Home Town: Our Little Secret: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Termite Terror
programme.desc: A single woman misses small town life and looks to make a fresh start in a historic home. Ben and Erin come up with big plans to update her home, but they encounter an unexpected problem that could derail the entire renovation.

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House
programme.desc: A minister and his wife are offered a clergy house, but the home is cramped with their family of seven. Ben and Erin share their vision for updating the space and show the couple the Collins House to give them a second, larger option.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Home Town: Termite Terror
programme.desc: A single woman misses small town life and looks to make a fresh start in a historic home. Ben and Erin come up with big plans to update her home, but they encounter an unexpected problem that could derail the entire renovation.

programme.title: Home Town: The Church House
programme.desc: A minister and his wife are offered a clergy house, but the home is cramped with their family of seven. Ben and Erin share their vision for updating the space and show the couple the Collins House to give them a second, larger option.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Home Town: Our Little Secret: Sweet Home Laurel
programme.desc: A Laurel, MS, native is ready to plant roots in the place her family has called home for generations. With her all-in budget of $100,000, Erin and Ben create a beautiful transformation that includes a quaint home office and a master bedroom.

programme.title: Home Town: Big Renovation in a Small Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin Napier love their small town of Laurel, Mississippi. They're passionate about making their town flourish like it did years ago. The best way they know how is to make Laurel a friendly and welcoming place to live.

programme.title: Home Town: Homecoming
programme.desc: Kyle and Brooke want their 'someday children' to grow up in a small town like they did, so they're leaving Nashville and heading back to their childhood hometown in Mississippi. The two of them want a house that has some history and room to grow.

programme.title: Good Bones: Tiny House Turns Into a Bohemian Bungalow
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a small house with a big price tag.

programme.title: Good Bones: A Neighborhood Eyesore That's Horrible Before Becomes an Amazing After
programme.desc: After purchasing a house from the city for only $4,000, Mina and Karen know they might have a lot of work in front of them. They discover detrimental water damage, horrific smells and questionable water lines.

programme.title: Good Bones: Client Renovation Rescue
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a renovation project for an optimistic client who bought a duplex with intentions of renovating it himself.

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-busting Victorian
programme.desc: Mina and Karen purchase a home near the Northside neighborhood that's full of historical features. They work on an open floor plan, but structural slow-downs and permitting nightmares threaten their schedule and budget.

programme.title: Good Bones: Flooded Two-Story Restored
programme.desc: Mina and Karen are welcomed into their new duplex with piles of clothes, two toilets and two feet of water in the basement. Although the girls have some disagreements, they hope all the hard work in this decrepit home pays off.

programme.title: Good Bones: Risky Reno With Historic Charm
programme.desc: Despite its odd layout and decrepit state, Mina and Karen are taking on an old house with a ton of historic charm in the Old Southside neighborhood. As framing starts, the crew uncovers a major structural problem that hits the budget hard.

programme.title: Love It or List It: A Family Contemplates Financial or Emotional Investments in Their Home
programme.desc: A family considers a financial or emotional investment.

programme.title: Love It or List It: Family and Future

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Right Back
programme.desc: When Alicia DeBolt goes missing, a helpful neighbor points the finger at an older kid she's been hanging out with. When police discover a string of texts on her cell phone, the net closes in on a sadistic killer whose obsession leads to tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Child Network
programme.desc: A woman adopts a 6-year-old on an online re-homing forum for children. She's soon inspired to help re-home other children, but is horrified when she discovers two of the children may have fallen into the clutches of a child abuser.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Blood and Sand
programme.desc: California beauty Pegye meets ace volleyball player Eric on the pristine sands of Newport Beach. With good looks and success they look like they've got it all but hedonism comes at a price, and living the dream quickly becomes a waking nightmare.

programme.title: Betrayed: Little Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: Bright aspiring architect Claudette Ficik, 19, charms every young man she meets, from coworkers at the pet store to classmates. When her body turns up in an Atlanta area river, a shocking secret is revealed: she was pregnant.

programme.title: Torn From the Headlines: New York Post Reports: Baby Hope
programme.desc: A grisly discovery in a picnic cooler on a highway in upper Manhattan leads detectives down a twisting trail of clues as they try to solve one of the longest-running mysteries in the New York Post's history, and hunt down a deranged child killer.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder in the Marina
programme.desc: Ed is a retired pilot whose sense of adventure is reawakened by a seaside encounter with the much-younger Denise. The couple sets up an idyllic life on a boat in a Florida marina until a sudden change in fortune rocks the couple's romantic seas forever.

programme.title: See No Evil: Watch Me Disappear
programme.desc: Sian O'Callaghan disappears after a night out in Swindon, UK. With the clock ticking, Detectives pull hours of surveillance footage from the area, until they hit gold: footage of her getting into a taxi. Now the race is on to ID the vehicle and driver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Sugar Land: Life or Death
programme.desc: A Texas man targeted by a hit man fights for the life of the person who ordered the murder; his son.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Jayme Closs Comes Home
programme.desc: Hear about disappearance and return of a Wisconsin teenager. Jayme Closs disappeared on October 15, 2018. Police responding to a strange 911 call from the house found both her parents dead. Closs was found alive on January 10, 70 miles from her home.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Evil in Idaho
programme.desc: Lisa Stukey lives in the small, picturesque community of Idaho Falls, Idaho. After she's not heard from for weeks, her decomposing body is found inside her home. When police finally catch the culprit, the killer has shocking ties to the victim.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Pick Your Poison
programme.desc: Bill and Mary Yoder are a happy couple, running a medical practice outside of Utica, New York. But their world collapses when Mary becomes mysteriously sick, and detectives prove that her illness was no accident.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Twisted Sister
programme.desc: When Elizabeth Flores was a child, her sister, Louise, tried to shield her from a horrible family secret. But when Louise met David Turpin, that all changed. The girl who ran from monsters became one herself.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Deadly Fetish
programme.desc: When Debra Davis's husband accused her of being cold and immature for refusing to experiment sexually, she thought something was wrong with her. She never suspected her husband's perversions were signs that there was something evil deep within him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Warrior POV: Road to Baghdad

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Container Dreamhouse
programme.desc: First-time builders Shay and Shae set out to build a home using five shipping containers on a wooded lot in Oklahoma. They hope his background in electrical and welding, and their collection of building materials, helps them finish the job quickly.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Floating Castle
programme.desc: Marine scientists in Florida hire engineers Nicolas Derouin and Arnaud Luguet to create a first-of-its-kind floating home. They have nine months to complete it, but unpredictable weather and building hiccups may sink this project before it can swim.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Paws, Present and Future

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Fire Damage Fixes
programme.desc: Nicole heads to her hometown of Detroit, Michigan to save a 1920s home that has been vacant since a fire in the house next door left it severely damaged.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Cracked Pipe Kitchen
programme.desc: Work continues on Nicole's project in her hometown of Detroit. Fire damage isn't the only thing causing problems: the main plumbing stack has a huge crack in it - causing years of water damage that has the walls crumbling at the touch.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Exterior Miracles
programme.desc: Tired of the house being an eyesore in the neighborhood, Nicole must remove all the debris left over from demolishing the burnt out house on the lot next door.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Burned Out Bathroom
programme.desc: A majority of the fire damage done to the Detroit house was on the second floor and Nicole takes on rehabbing the upper unit's kitchen and bathroom. Also, a visit to her grandparent's home reminds Nicole where her passion comes from.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Lower Level Living Room
programme.desc: Nicole works to finish up the lower level apartment by ripping up the stinky old carpet in the living and dining rooms, exposing hardwood floors she knows she can easily repair. Then, she meets an expert who helps her repair the lead glass windows.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: From Charred to Charming
programme.desc: In the home stretch on her project in Detroit, Nicole must finish up the upper apartment which is the area the fire damaged the most. The community comes together to build an urban garden.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Kids' Dream Lake House
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a DIY homeowner jumpstart his project and renovate with kids in mind. With a budget of $30,000 and a July 1st deadline, the masters are going to have to use their imagination on this one.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hawaii Fried Dough
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in the Aloha State for the 'Iolani Fair. This school fundraiser fair in Honolulu features Hawaiian-style fried dough in the Malasada Ice Cream Sandwich and Sweet Roll Sliders.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Jersey Shore, NJ
programme.desc: Casey's drive to devour America's most delicious dishes brings him back to his roots: the Jersey Shore. He's here for an explosive sandwich, stuffed lobster and a ghost chili-infused pizza challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Columbus, Ohio
programme.desc: Casey Webb's countrywide edible expedition brings him to Columbus, Ohio. His massive meals include a bacon-wrapped hot dog with a crazy combination of toppings and a footlong chicken burrito blanketed in ghost pepper sauce.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to Mystic, Conn., to conquer land and sea with a totally bonkers, Portuguese-inspired burger and a crazy coastal feast of chowder.
